## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Link any relevant issues or context.

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Include instructions so reviewers can reproduce. Include relevant details such as device model, Android version, and test configuration.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual testing on device
- [ ] Manual testing on emulator

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover my changes
- [ ] The code passes all existing lint checks
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where necessary
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have linked the related issue(s) below

## Related Issues

Closes #<!-- issue number -->
